action.reasoning: Observation: 5-model ensemble (with cnxt_hires2) got 0.8006, slightly worse than 4-model 0.8009. Best is still 4-model ensemble. Analysis: With 5 iterations and 4.19h left, I should revert predict.py to exclude cnxt_hires2 to lock in 0.8009. Then maybe try one more diverse experiment. Decision: Revert predict.py to 4-model ensemble (best.pt + cnxt2 + cnxt3 + cnxt_hires) and submit eval to confirm 0.8009.
